name: appstore-precheck
description: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check: static scan, optional fastlane precheck, guideline drift watch, Pierre explains every FAIL and WARN, and semantic deep review before you submit.

interface.shortDescription: Catch App Store rejections before a reviewer does.
interface.longDescription: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check. Static scan, optional fastlane precheck, guideline drift watch, Pierre commentary, and semantic deep review — with a GREEN/YELLOW/RED verdict before you upload.
defaultPrompt: Run appstore-precheck on this iOS project before App Store submission.
